ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., bank, credit card, investment) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number for identification */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, frozen) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "institution_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the financial institution's logo */,
  "next_statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the next account statement */,
  "last_statement_balance" TEXT /* Balance as of the last statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the transaction belongs to */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant or payee */,
  "merchant_location" TEXT /* Location of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., card, cash, online transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is part of a recurring series */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurring transactions (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is flagged for review */,
  "flagged_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_tags" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the budget */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget is currently active */,
  "actual_spent" TEXT /* Actual amount spent in the budget category */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold amount that triggers an alert when the budget is close to being exceeded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., income, expenses, balance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or data of the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  "sharing_link" TEXT /* Link for sharing the report with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
